title: heliophila collina
intro: Heliophila collina, also known as the 'Cape Marigold', is a flowering plant species native to the western and southern parts of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Heliophila collina can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
